items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, but the provided evidence does not include any checks or reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for compatibility with these access types, yet there is no evidence in the prior steps that demonstrates their implementation or validation. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
